name: The Outcome Will Tell Us Who's Strong and Who's Weak

issues.description: SearchDeck does not support the required 'look at 5 cards' mechanic with conditional reveal and bottom-deck placement. Current DSL uses SearchDeck which searches entire deck, not limited to top 5.
Missing filter for card name exclusion: [The Outcome Will Tell Us Who's Strong and Who's Weak] must be excluded from selection.
Second effect (Trigger → DrawCard) is incorrect. The card effect does not draw a card; it manipulates deck order by placing non-revealed cards at bottom in any order.

Current DSL structure cannot express: (1) Look at top 5 cards as a set operation, (2) reveal UP TO 1 (optional), (3) place rest at bottom in any order. These require custom action types or extended syntax not present in standard OPTCG DSL.
